title: Principal Frontend Developer at Airtel India Capital India

jsonLd.title: Principal Frontend Developer at Airtel India Capital India
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Airtel India Capital India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Frontend Developer to strengthen our Visakhapatnam-based team.

About Airtel India Capital India:
Airtel India Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Airtel India Capital India!
